entity.label: Jarmuth
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A Levitical city of the tribe of Issachar (Josh. 21:29), supposed by some to be the Ramah of Samuel (1 Sam. 19:22).

nodes.label: Jarmuth
nodes.description: A Levitical city of the tribe of Issachar (Josh. 21:29), supposed by some to be the Ramah of Samuel (1 Sam. 19:22).

verses.text: Jarmuth with her suburbs, Engannim with her suburbs; four cities.
